final:
module counter (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [1:0] count
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 2'b0;
    end else if (enable) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
